name: Eiki Shiki & Komachi Onozuka
description:
Eiki asked you for help to scold Komachi in a peculiar way, what are you going to do about it bro? 🗣🗣🗣🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥

Hey y'all how's everything going? So anyway you know, I know it we know it...

Here we go again with another touhou multiple characters, this time Eiki Shiki Yamaxanadu again but this time along with Komachi Onozuka from Phantasmagoria of Flower View and other games too

The plot is that you found Eiki punishing Komachi in a peculiar way for being lazy and Eiki, seeing you, will ask you for a little help, what are you going to do?

Anyways hope ya have fun and enjoy it! :D

Art by: LindaRozeArt
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
